docs.title: services.pcsd.enable
docs.text:
Whether to enable pcsd.

Type: boolean

Default:

false

Example:

```nix linenums="1"nix true 

*Declared by:*
 - [modules/default\.nix\#L30
](https://github.com/matt1432/nixos-pcsd/blob/master/modules/default.nix#L30
)



## services\.pcsd\.enableBinaryCache



Option to add the binary cache to your settings\.



*Type:*
boolean



*Default:*

```nix
false

Declared by: - modules/default.nix#L32

docs.title: services.pcsd.enableWebUI
docs.text:
Enable the webUI of pcsd.

Type: boolean

Default:

false

Declared by: - modules/default.nix#L133

docs.title: services.pcsd.package
docs.text:
The pcs package to use. By default, this option will use the packages.default as exposed by this flake.

Type: package

Default:

pcsd.packages.x86_64-linux.default

Declared by: - modules/default.nix#L105

docs.title: services.pcsd.clusterName
docs.text:
Name of the cluster. This option will be passed to services.corosync.clusterName.

Type: string

Default:

"nixcluster"

Declared by: - modules/default.nix#L49

docs.title: services.pcsd.clusterUserPasswordFile
docs.text:
Required path to a file containing the password of the hacluster user in clear text.

Type: null or absolute path

Declared by: - modules/default.nix#L151

docs.title: services.pcsd.corosyncKeyFile
docs.text:
Required path to a file containing the key for corosync. See corosync-keygen(8).

Type: null or absolute path

Declared by: - modules/default.nix#L41

docs.title: services.pcsd.extraCommands
docs.text:
A list of additional pcs commands to run after everything else is setup. Cannot have the -f option. See pcs(8)

Type: list of string matching the pattern ^(pcs .*)$

Default:

[ ]

Example:

```nix linenums="1"nix [ "pcs property set stonith-enabled=false" ]

*Declared by:*
 - [modules/default\.nix\#L290
](https://github.com/matt1432/nixos-pcsd/blob/master/modules/default.nix#L290
)



## services\.pcsd\.finalPackage



The package defined by ` services.pcsd.package ` with overrides applied\.



*Type:*
package *(read only)*



*Default:*

```nix
pcsd.packages.x86_64-linux.default.override {
  pcs-web-ui = pcsd.packages.x86_64-linux.pcs-web-ui;
  withWebUI = false;
}

Declared by: - modules/default.nix#L115

docs.title: services.pcsd.mainNode
docs.text:
The name of the node in charge of updating the cluster settings. Defaults to the first node declared in services.pcsd.nodes.

Type: string

Default:

"Name of your first node"

Declared by: - modules/default.nix#L57

docs.title: services.pcsd.nodes
docs.text:
List of nodes in the cluster. This option will be passed to services.corosync.nodelist.

Type: list of (submodule)

Default:

[ ]

Example:

```nix linenums="1"nix [ { name = "this Machine's Hostname"; nodeid = 1; ring_addrs = [ # This is where your machine's local ips go "192.168.0.255" ]; }

# the other nodes of your cluster go here ]

*Declared by:*
 - [modules/default\.nix\#L67
](https://github.com/matt1432/nixos-pcsd/blob/master/modules/default.nix#L67
)



## services\.pcsd\.nodes\.\*\.name



Node name\.



*Type:*
string

*Declared by:*
 - [modules/default\.nix\#L92
](https://github.com/matt1432/nixos-pcsd/blob/master/modules/default.nix#L92
)



## services\.pcsd\.nodes\.\*\.nodeid



Node ID number\.



*Type:*
signed integer

*Declared by:*
 - [modules/default\.nix\#L88
](https://github.com/matt1432/nixos-pcsd/blob/master/modules/default.nix#L88
)



## services\.pcsd\.nodes\.\*\.ring_addrs



List of IP addresses, one for each ring\.



*Type:*
list of string

*Declared by:*
 - [modules/default\.nix\#L96
](https://github.com/matt1432/nixos-pcsd/blob/master/modules/default.nix#L96
)



## services\.pcsd\.systemdResources



An ordered list of sets that represent all the systemd services that will
be managed by pcsd\.



*Type:*
list of (submodule)



*Default:*

```nix
{ }

Example:

```nix linenums="1"nix systemdResources = { "caddy" = { enable = true; group = "caddy-grp"; };

"headscale" = { enable = true; group = "caddy-grp"; startAfter = ["caddy"]; }; }

*Declared by:*
 - [modules/default\.nix\#L158
](https://github.com/matt1432/nixos-pcsd/blob/master/modules/default.nix#L158
)



## services\.pcsd\.systemdResources\.\*\.enable



Whether this service is managed by pcs or not\. If not enabled,
this service can only be started by a user manually\.



*Type:*
boolean



*Default:*

```nix
true

Declared by: - modules/default.nix#L180

docs.title: services.pcsd.systemdResources.*.extraArgs
docs.text:
Additional command line options added to pcs commands when making a systemd resource.

Type: list of string

Default:

[ ]

Declared by: - modules/default.nix#L207

docs.title: services.pcsd.systemdResources.*.group
docs.text:
The name of the group in which we want to place this resource. This allows multiple resources to always be on the same node and can also make the order in which the resources start configurable.

Type: null or string

Default:

null

Declared by: - modules/default.nix#L197

docs.title: services.pcsd.systemdResources.*.systemdName
docs.text:
The name of the systemd unit file without ‘.service’. By default, this option will use the name of this attribute.

Type: string

Declared by: - modules/default.nix#L189

docs.title: services.pcsd.virtualIps
docs.text:
An ordered list of sets that represent all the virtual IPs that will be managed by pcsd.

Type: list of (submodule)

Default:

{ }

Example:

```nix linenums="1"nix virtualIps = { "caddy-vip" = { ip = "10.0.0.130"; interface = "eno1"; group = "caddy-grp"; startBefore = ["caddy"]; }; }

*Declared by:*
 - [modules/default\.nix\#L218
](https://github.com/matt1432/nixos-pcsd/blob/master/modules/default.nix#L218
)



## services\.pcsd\.virtualIps\.\*\.enable



Whether this service is managed by pcs or not\.



*Type:*
boolean



*Default:*

```nix
true

Declared by: - modules/default.nix#L236

docs.title: services.pcsd.virtualIps.*.cidr
docs.text:
The CIDR range of the IP.

Type: signed integer

Default:

24

Declared by: - modules/default.nix#L263

docs.title: services.pcsd.virtualIps.*.extraArgs
docs.text:
Additional command line options added to pcs commands when making a virtual IP.

Type: list of string

Default:

[ ]

Declared by: - modules/default.nix#L279

docs.title: services.pcsd.virtualIps.*.group
docs.text:
The name of the group in which we want to place this resource. This allows multiple resources to always be on the same node and can also make the order in which the resources start configurable.

Type: null or string

Default:

null

Declared by: - modules/default.nix#L269

docs.title: services.pcsd.virtualIps.*.id
docs.text:
The name of the resource as pacemaker sees it. By default, this option will use the name of this attribute.

Type: string

Declared by: - modules/default.nix#L244

docs.title: services.pcsd.virtualIps.*.interface
docs.text:
The network interface this IP will be bound to.

Type: string

Default:

"eno1"

Declared by: - modules/default.nix#L252

docs.title: services.pcsd.virtualIps.*.ip
docs.text:
The actual IP address.

Type: string

Declared by: - modules/default.nix#L258

docs.title: services.pcsd.webUIPackage
docs.text:
The pcs webUI package to use. By default, this option will use the packages.pcs-web-ui as exposed by this flake.

Type: package

Default:

pcsd.packages.x86_64-linux.pcs-web-ui
